note: NightK NoLazyRoll: keep no-inward roll clips and low baseline, but add wrong-sign lateral roll action penalty plus nonzero minimum outward margin so both left/right lateral commands keep live outward roll instead of collapsing to clipped zero. Command: Night K：基于 NightJ 低基础方案，堵住右走 roll 躺平解。恢复一点最小外展和 outward margin，并新增 lateral roll wrong-sign action 惩罚，防止策略把动作打进 no-inward hard clip 吃掉的方向。
